decks.notes: The deck focuses on using artifacts to generate value and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Emry and Goblin Welder serve as key pieces in recurring artifacts from the graveyard, while Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer provide additional aggro pressure. Krang and Twinshot Sniper offer powerful abilities to control the board. The deck is supported by fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Mox Opal, along with synergy cards like Mishra's Bauble and Urza's Bauble. The land base includes Urza's Saga for additional artifact generation. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with efficient artifact synergies and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with Dredge creatures using cards like Golgari Grave-Troll and Stinkweed Imp, and then utilize cards like Bridge from Below and Dread Return to create a powerful board presence. Other cards like Narcomoeba and Poxwalkers help to further fuel the graveyard, while powerful discard spells like Cabal Therapy disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win the game through overwhelming the opponent with a sudden burst of creatures and using cards like Thassa's Oracle to secure victory.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing powerful creatures like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls, as well as efficient removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence and apply pressure early in the game. With a mix of creatures, spells, and lands that support the aggro strategy, the deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison also helps disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to cheat big creatures onto the battlefield quickly and efficiently through cards such as Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Omniscience. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. The deck also includes control elements like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is designed to support the explosive plays of the deck while providing the necessary colors to cast all spells.

This deck focuses on using creatures and spells to control the game and generate massive amounts of mana from Gaea's Cradle. By ramping up quickly, playing powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, and disrupting the opponent with cards like Thoughtseize and Collector Ouphe, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The deck also utilizes efficient creature tutors like Green Sun's Zenith and Natural Order to find key pieces when needed, making it a versatile and adaptive control deck in the Legacy format.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly play powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Reality Smasher, supported by disruptive spells and cards like Chalice of the Void and Kozilek's Command. By using fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Mox Diamond, along with lands that help accelerate mana production like Ancient Tomb and Eldrazi Temple, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggression and disruption to secure victory in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up a powerful win condition with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage. Key cards like Life from the Loam and Exploration help to accelerate land development and provide resilience against disruption. Boseiju, Who Endures and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale offer additional protection and control options, ensuring that the deck can outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through a dominant land-based strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to maintain a fast and aggressive tempo while disrupting the opponent's strategy through a combination of countermagic and removal spells. Utilizing efficient creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler and Murktide Regent, along with disruptive spells like Daze and Force of Will, the deck aims to quickly establish board presence and control the game. Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm help with card selection and setting up draws, while Lightning Bolt provides additional removal. The land base includes fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent mana production.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful artifacts such as Chalice of the Void and Urza's Saga to disrupt opponents while also generating value with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive artifact creatures like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer, backed up by counterspells like Force of Will for protection. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Karakas for card advantage and utility. Overall, the deck aims to win through efficient aggression and disruption utilizing blue artifacts.

The deck focuses on aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls to pump up creatures and deal damage, while also including disruptive cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben to slow down the opponent. The land base is designed for consistency and to provide the colors necessary for the spells in the deck. Overall, the goal is to establish a fast and powerful board presence to defeat the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of removal spells, counter magic, and disruptive creatures to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By using cards like Fatal Push and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's game plan, along with efficient card draw like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck aims to grind out incremental advantages and eventually take over the game. Additionally, the presence of powerful threats like Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides a win condition for the deck once it has established control of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through resource management and disruption while ramping into powerful threats. Utilizing cards like Natural Order and Green Sun's Zenith to tutor up key creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Wight of the Reliquary, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big plays. Additionally, the inclusion of disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Endurance helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan while ensuring the deck can operate smoothly. The mana base is built around Gaea's Cradle to generate massive amounts of mana for explosive turns.

The deck focuses on utilizing tempo plays and disruption to control the game while applying aggressive pressure to the opponent. It utilizes cards like Brainstorm, Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to disrupt the opponent's game plan while deploying threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent to close out the game quickly. The deck also includes removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to deal with opposing threats. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish board dominance and disrupt the opponent's strategy to secure a win.

The main concept of this Eldrazi Aggro deck is to quickly deploy powerful Eldrazi creatures on the battlefield, disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer. Utilizing fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide, the deck aims to apply pressure early on while maintaining a solid board presence with cards like Reality Smasher and Glaring Fleshraker. The inclusion of Eldrazi Temple and Eye of Ugin helps to accelerate playing the big Eldrazi threats, overwhelming the opponent and securing a swift victory.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature strategies, using powerful cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls to push through damage quickly. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency with fetch lands and dual lands, allowing for smooth gameplay. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain control of the board while seeking to close out games quickly.

This deck aims to win as quickly as possible by filling the graveyard with creatures like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, then using Dread Return to bring back Thassa's Oracle for a win condition. It relies heavily on rituals and mana acceleration to cast multiple spells in one turn, while also utilizing Pact of Negation to protect its combo. The deck includes graveyard recursion cards like Memory's Journey and Reanimate to ensure consistency. It also includes disruptive spells like Cabal Therapy and Thoughtseize to control the opponent's game plan.
